64682fcffaa56bc597faacb9.leadin: Yoruba folktales were an influence on this later Nigerian author. For 10 points each:
64682fcffaa56bc597faacb9.leadin_sanitized: Yoruba folktales were an influence on this later Nigerian author. For 10 points each:
parts: Name this author who wrote about a man who journeys to Dead’s Town to bring his tapster back to life in his novel The Palm-Wine Drinkard .
This is the first ghost encountered by the main character of Tutuola’s novel My Life in the Bush of Ghosts . This being turns the narrator into a camel and then into a horse using a juju.
